title: [Pharmacology of hydrazinocarbonic acids, hydrazinopeptides and various hydrazine derivatives. II. Studies of the reaction of alpha-hydrazinocarbonic acid derivatives and carbonic acid hydrazines with pyridoxal-5-phosphate and aldehydes].
